message:
docs(AGENTS.md): add UBS Quick Reference section for AI agents

Append the Ultimate Bug Scanner (UBS) quick reference guide to AGENTS.md
so all coding agents working on this repo have immediate access to the
UBS workflow, commands, output format, fix protocol, severity tiers, and
anti-patterns—without needing to consult external documentation.

Key content added:
- Install one-liner for UBS
- Golden rule: run `ubs <changed-files>` before every commit
- Full command examples (specific files, staged files, language filter,
  CI mode, whole-project scan)
- Output format parsing guide (file:line:col, fix suggestions, exit code)
- Six-step fix workflow (read → navigate → verify → fix → re-run → commit)
- Speed guidance: scope to changed files for sub-second feedback
- Bug severity tiers: Critical (null safety, XSS, async, leaks),
  Important (type narrowing, division-by-zero, resource leaks),
  Contextual (TODO/FIXME, console logs)
- Three anti-patterns with corrections

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -727,3 +727,53 @@ NEVER EVER DO THAT AGAIN. The answer is literally ALWAYS the same: those are cha
 ## Note on Built-in TODO Functionality
 
 Also, if I ask you to explicitly use your built-in TODO functionality, don't complain about this and say you need to use beads. You can use built-in TODOs if I tell you specifically to do so. Always comply with such orders.
+
+````markdown
+## UBS Quick Reference for AI Agents
+
+UBS stands for "Ultimate Bug Scanner": **The AI Coding Agent's Secret Weapon: Flagging Likely Bugs for Fixing Early On**
+
+**Install:** `curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh | bash`
+
+**Golden Rule:** `ubs <changed-files>` before every commit. Exit 0 = safe. Exit >0 = fix & re-run.
+
+**Commands:**
+```bash
+ubs file.ts file2.py                    # Specific files (< 1s) — USE THIS
+ubs $(git diff --name-only --cached)    # Staged files — before commit
+ubs --only=js,python src/               # Language filter (3-5x faster)
+ubs --ci --fail-on-warning .            # CI mode — before PR
+ubs --help                              # Full command reference
+ubs sessions --entries 1                # Tail the latest install session log
+ubs .                                   # Whole project (ignores things like .venv and node_modules automatically)
+```
+
+**Output Format:**
+```
+⚠️  Category (N errors)
+    file.ts:42:5 – Issue description
+    💡 Suggested fix
+Exit code: 1
+```
+Parse: `file:line:col` → location | 💡 → how to fix | Exit 0/1 → pass/fail
+
+**Fix Workflow:**
+1. Read finding → category + fix suggestion
+2. Navigate `file:line:col` → view context
+3. Verify real issue (not false positive)
+4. Fix root cause (not symptom)
+5. Re-run `ubs <file>` → exit 0
+6. Commit
+
+**Speed Critical:** Scope to changed files. `ubs src/file.ts` (< 1s) vs `ubs .` (30s). Never full scan for small edits.
+
+**Bug Severity:**
+- **Critical** (always fix): Null safety, XSS/injection, async/await, memory leaks
+- **Important** (production): Type narrowing, division-by-zero, resource leaks
+- **Contextual** (judgment): TODO/FIXME, console logs
+
+**Anti-Patterns:**
+- ❌ Ignore findings → ✅ Investigate each
+- ❌ Full scan per edit → ✅ Scope to file
+- ❌ Fix symptom (`if (x) { x.y }`) → ✅ Root cause (`x?.y`)
+````
